Personal income tax filing for UK and Spain residents

pros: Simple guided flow for UK and Spain income tax
Accountant review adds peace of mind
Good fit for freelancers and side-income filers
cons: Consumer tax only — not for businesses
Geography limited to UK and Spain

review.verdict: Friendly guided personal tax filing for UK/Spain — niche but well executed.
review.best_for: Freelancers and salaried individuals in UK/Spain who want low-friction tax returns.
review.not_for: Companies, multi-country filers or anyone needing business accounting.

lock_in.reason: Personal tax service, filed records exportable
